_comment: IMPORTANT: uses Facebook's SEARCH url (/search?query=...), which is the ONLY view that actually honors sortBy=creation_time_descend (newest first) and daysSinceListed. The category-browse url ignores those and returns a 'Suggested' mix. query=car/truck/suv covers all body styles. daysSinceListed=30 = last 24h so brand-new cars surface at the top every cycle. radius is set on the account's Marketplace location; the value here nudges it wider. Real city comes from each listing.
_filters_comment: A car is kept if it matches ANY entry in 'wanted' (OR logic). Leave 'wanted' empty [] to keep every car. Each wanted entry: all of its set fields must match (AND logic). Fields are optional — omit what you don't care about. Current setup: ANY brand, price >= $6000, mileage <= 120k, year 2016-2025.

filters._includeCities_note: Only keep cars whose listing city is in this list. Empty [] = keep every city (whole radius area). Currently empty per user request (whole 65-mile area).

_freshness_comment: maxListingAgeDays: only keep cars FACEBOOK says were listed within this many days. null = keep ALL cars (any age). maxDetailFetchesPerRun caps how many listing pages we open per run to read the exact 'Listed X ago' time (higher = more get a real time, but slower + higher ban risk).
_readDetails_note: false = skip opening each car's page (no mileage, no exact 'Listed X ago'). Much faster, all cars appear instantly, far lower ban risk. Newest-found cars sort to the top.
